_meta.format: Anthropic two-prompt harness JSON ledger (Nov 2025 pattern)
_meta.purpose: Atomic feature ledger for the 21-day Atelier sprint. Coding agent picks next unblocked unstarted feature, runs end-to-end test before touching the next. JSON not Markdown so Claude is less likely to silently rewrite.
_meta.completion_metric: passes: true on all P0 features by 2026-06-03
_meta.see_also: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-14-atelier-sprint-plan.md for day-by-day TDD bite-sized tasks per feature

features.name: Initialize repo with full SDLC scaffold
features.notes: Initial commit + 2nd workflow tightening commit + secrets README. 84 files committed.

features.name: Create phase/1 worktree + install pre-commit hooks
Run init.sh; verify host prereqs

N2 Source Resolver deterministic gate: descriptor exists OR brief contains path → resolve to project context

Pipeline now: SequentialAgent([N1, N2]); integration test brief + descriptor → BriefSpec + ProjectContext

Stitch MCP wiring via ADK MCPToolset pointing at https://stitch.googleapis.com/mcp; auth via Secret Manager atelier-geap-api-key

N3a unit tests: 5 tests + 1 integration test (mocked Stitch responses); generation success rate ≥ 95% on 20 fixture briefs

N3c gate axis: Lighthouse a11y + perf + best-practices subprocess wrapper; 2 unit tests

N3c gate axis: semantic-HTML linter via html-validate subprocess; 2 unit tests
